name: Create-a-Muffin
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pancake & Waffle Mix (Aunt Jemima Original)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease 12 medium muffin cups or line with paper baking cups.
3. In a medium bowl, combine pancake mix and sugar.
4. Add milk, egg, and oil, mixing just until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 full.
6. Bake for 17 to 20 minutes, or until light golden brown.
Blueberry Muffins:
- Add 3/4 cup fresh or frozen blueberries to the batter.
Surprise Muffins:
- Fill muffin cups 1/2 full with batter.
- Spoon 1 level teaspoon of desired flavored preserves into the center of each muffin.
- Top with remaining batter, filling each muffin cup 2/3 full.
Nut Muffins:
- Add 3/4 cup chopped nuts to the batter.
Whole Wheat Muffins:
- Substitute Aunt Jemima Whole Wheat Pancake & Waffle Mix for Original.
- Before baking, top each muffin with a pecan half if desired.
Buckwheat Muffins:
- Substitute Aunt Jemima Buckwheat Pancake & Waffle Mix for Original.
